intro_en: An ordered path through this site — from method to tafsir, concept maps, quiz, and the deep GitHub corpus.
intro_ur: اس سائٹ کا ترتیب شدہ راستہ — منہج سے تفسیر، تصوراتی خاکے، کوئز اور گہرے GitHub ذخیرے تک۔

steps.blurb_en: Source hierarchy, six axes, and how to read applied diagrams.
Six-chapter Urdu primer on ahd, mithaq, amanah and uqud.
201 covenant loci across 60 surahs with Arabic text and study notes.
Core terms: ahd, mithaq, amanah, bayah, uqud, wad, dhimma.
Fifty covenant-themed reports (H01-H50) with grades and Quran links.
312 paradigm concept plates — method, proof, dossiers, and architecture.
420 scenario questions with diagram plates across 25 domains.
Books and diagram collections for offline study.
Full Mithaq corpus: QUSX packages, METHOD review, and edition builds.
